{{CargoOrgan
|name=Psychic Aura
|type=Common
|rank=green
|id=10802
|idx=2
|description=After years of praying, the faith of the devoted manifests itself in the form of bright halos over their heads.
|skill=
|hp=670
|def=34
|atk=46
|rush=60
|gene1=In explorations, B-tads gained +2.5%
|gene2=In explorations, B-tads gained +2.5%
|gene7=In explorations, B-tads gained +2.5% (Awakened)
|}}
